title: rosa × salaevensis var. lereschei
intro: Rosa × salaevensis var. lereschei, also known as Leresche's rose, is a hybrid rose species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa × salaevensis var. lereschei include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antiseptic agent, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin issues and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the flowers in hot water to create a tea or by using it in a topical ointment or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
